meaning: adj.污秽的,肮脏的,令人厌恶的,淫秽的,下流的,凶相的,威胁的
examples: That was a nasty little trick.
He had a temper and could be nasty.
Ticks can carry a nasty disease which affects humans.
Everything else took a beating, thanks to a nasty mix of weak demand and price cuts.
If you're one of the buyers, you could be in for some nasty tax surprises.
